title: On May Day Cuba’s Communist Leaders Deliver a Defiant Tone to the U.S.
summary_full: In front of the American Embassy in Havana, the Cuban government held its annual International Worker’s Day celebration as the United States sought to end the communist ruling system.
summary_public: In front of the American Embassy in Havana, the Cuban government held its annual International Worker’s Day celebration as the United States sought to end the communist ruling system.
